creator.title: Creator
creator.subtitle: Your Mr.FOX Creator guide — what makes us different, what you get, and how to start

intro.title: Why be a Creator on Mr.FOX?
intro.description: Mr.FOX is not just another profile on a giant feed — it is an ecosystem where you get your own site, app, and revenue channels. Fans can vote, send gifts, watch live, and support you directly in one place.

items.title: Multiple revenue streams
items.description: Vote, Gift, Live, Chat, voice/video calls, and subscriptions — full monetization in one stack, not ads alone.

items.title: Fans reach you faster
items.description: Fans download the Mr.FOX app and reach multiple Creator sites in ≤ 3 taps — no scattered links.

items.title: Launch quickly
items.description: Ready-made platform types with CMS, mobile app, and payments — no need to build everything from scratch.

items.title: A platform that feels yours
items.description: From multi-creator niche hubs to a solo official platform for one Creator.

rows.label: Revenue
rows.fox: Vote · Gift · Live · Chat · Subscription — fans pay Creators directly
rows.others: Mostly ads, tips, or platform-controlled commission

rows.label: Fans
rows.fox: One app reaches many Creator platforms across the Mr.FOX network
rows.others: Fans chase separate apps, links, and channels

rows.label: In-app activities
rows.fox: Turn activities on or off freely — choose only the features you want, nothing forced
rows.others: Features are set by the platform — little room to customize, often mandatory

rows.label: Getting started
rows.fox: Pick a platform type and launch fast with team support
rows.others: Build yourself, wait for invite, or compete in one crowded feed

platforms.title: Platform Types
platforms.subtitle: One app — many sites across Creator, Community, and Contest

overview.title: One app, many sites, clear rules
overview.description: Mr.FOX is not a single app experience — it is one hub that unites many sites. Each site runs on one of three templates below that define who can post and what fans can do.

layers.label: Mr.FOX App
layers.text: Download once — access FOXY, Silom, Beauty Queen, and more from one place

layers.label: Platform Type
layers.text: One of three rule templates — who posts, votes, gifts, or goes live

layers.label: Site / Application
layers.text: Each brand in the network — e.g. FOXY or Silom — picks the type that fits its community

overview.coexistDescription: Some sites are creator-led — fans vote and send gifts but cannot post (Creator Specific). Some are open communities where every member posts and participates (Community). Some run contests where only contestants post and the audience votes (The Contest). All live in one ecosystem — users enter the site that matches what they want to do.
overview.typesTitle: 3 Platform Types — who can do what?

types.name: Creator Specific
types.summary: Creator-led sites — fans watch, vote, gift, and join live streams, but cannot post. e.g. FOXY, CupE, Himbo

types.name: Community
types.summary: Everyone can post, comment, and participate — no strict creator vs fan split. e.g. Silom, student communities

types.name: The Contest
types.summary: Contest platforms — only contestants post entries; fans vote and support but cannot post

overview.catalogHint: Scroll down for full details and live applications in each type

creator-specific.subtitle: Platforms designed for each creator community
paragraphs: Creator Specific is built around how each creator niche actually works. Every community creates content, grows an audience, and earns differently — so one generic platform rarely fits everyone.
With Mr.FOX, each platform can shape the full experience for its audience: profiles, content categories, discovery, fan engagement, and features tailored to that community.

Creators can publish content, go live, talk to fans, run memberships, receive digital gifts, and earn from their audience in one place. Fans can discover creators they care about, engage with content, and grow with the community they belong to.
Whether you are building for pageants, cosplay, models, gamers, or any niche creator community, Mr.FOX can turn that idea into a ready-to-run platform built for long-term growth.

community-specific.subtitle: When everyone can create value for the community
paragraphs: Community is a platform for building online societies where everyone can participate — sharing knowledge, discussing ideas, exchanging opinions, or creating content together, without a single person at the center.

Members can form interest groups, run their own communities, open spaces for conversation, host online activities, and build relationships naturally. Communities grow through participation from everyone, not follower counts alone.
Whether for brands, learning groups, fan clubs, hobbies, or organizations, Community provides the tools for communication, engagement, and member growth to continue in one platform.

sampleLink.title: See a Community example on the platform
sampleLink.label: Open Community sample

the-contest.subtitle: A competition platform designed for creators
paragraphs: The Contest makes creator competitions simple, end-to-end, and fully engaging — from contestant registration and profile management to publishing entries, voting, scoring, comments, live streaming, and activities throughout the event.

More than finding a winner, The Contest is designed so every competition becomes a space where creators can showcase their potential, build a following, increase engagement, and unlock new opportunities after the event ends. Audiences can vote, follow, and support their favorite contestants throughout.

Whether pageants, cosplay contests, live-stream competitions, content contests, or creator events of any kind, The Contest turns every competition into an experience that creates value for organizers, contestants, and viewers alike.

faq.question: How long until I hear back?
faq.answer: Usually within 2–3 business days. For urgent app issues, choose Support as the subject or call 02-9575771 ext. 75 during business hours.

faq.question: What's the fastest way to reach you?
faq.answer: Call or email support@mrfox.com during business hours, Mon–Fri 09:00–18:00. For app issues, select Support in the form.

faq.question: What's the difference between Support and Business?
faq.answer: Support is for app usage, accounts, and existing services. Business Inquiry is for organizations or brands interested in using the Mr.FOX platform or consulting on new projects.
